new_terms.context: Power supply unit, evolving from node level to centralized rack level.
A centralized power delivery component in a rack, often containing multiple PSUs.
High voltage direct current power racks used for transmission efficiency.
Battery backup units for power stability in AI server racks.
Capacitor backup units used for short-term power stability and peak shaving.
Solid state transformers being developed to increase transmission efficiency.
A strategy to manage power demand by using BBU/CBU during peak loads.
Cables providing power from the facility to the power shelves (e.g., 100A whips).
